summary: Clear audience recording captures a wild Bird Song jam with overall clean sound.
review: Both reviewers praise the audience‑sourced tape for its clarity, noting that every instrument can be heard clearly despite a slightly boomy low end. The highlight of the performance is an explosive Bird Song jam that they describe as “crazy.” The recording delivers a vivid concert atmosphere while remaining easy to listen to.

ai_rating.rationale: Two reviews, one strong 4‑star endorsement and another enthusiastic comment about the Bird Song jam; both indicate a good show and a clear audience recording.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Clean overall sound with clear instrument separation; bass a bit boomy but can be corrected with EQ. No major dropouts reported.

show_quality.setlist_flow: The audience recording preserves the concert energy, and reviewers single out the Bird Song jam as a peak moment of the set.
